title: Nuage Decongestant Vaporising Candle for Easy Breathing, 60G
features: ROOM DECONGESTANT: Unscrew the metal lid on your Nuage Vaporising Candle and light. Burn only on a level, secure, on-porous heat resistant surface to gently infuse any room in your home with a soothing fragrance. Relax and breathe easier. Never leave a burning candle unattended. Replace screw lid once the candle has cooled completely

CARE PACKAGE: Friend, colleague or family member unwell with a cold or flu? Create a care package of useful, thoughtful items to ease symptoms and aid recovery. Tissues, bottled water and products from the Nuage Vapour Range to ease muscles, relax the mind and aid easier breathing
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Nuage Vaporising Candle, contains soothing menthol & eucalyptol, 60g
